// ==== koine/generated/billing/CustomerId.java ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing;

/**
 * A strongly-typed identity value referenced by this context but owned elsewhere.
 */
public record CustomerId(java.util.UUID value) {}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/DomainEvent.java ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing;

/**
 * Every domain event this context can raise — a sealed sum a recorded-events list can hold.
 */
public sealed interface DomainEvent permits InvoiceIssued {}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/Invoice.java ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing;

public final class Invoice {
    private final InvoiceId id;
    private final java.math.BigDecimal total;
    private InvoiceStatus status;
    private final java.util.Optional<String> note;
    private final java.util.List<DomainEvent> domainEvents = new java.util.ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * Creates a validated Invoice, enforcing its invariants.
     */
    public Invoice(InvoiceId id, java.math.BigDecimal total, java.util.Optional<String> note) {
        this.id = id;
        this.total = total;
        this.note = note == null ? java.util.Optional.empty() : note;
        this.status = InvoiceStatus.Draft;
    }

    public InvoiceId id() {
        return this.id;
    }

    public java.math.BigDecimal total() {
        return this.total;
    }

    public InvoiceStatus status() {
        return this.status;
    }

    public java.util.Optional<String> note() {
        return this.note;
    }

    /**
     * The domain events recorded so far, as an unmodifiable snapshot.
     */
    public java.util.List<DomainEvent> domainEvents() {
        return java.util.List.copyOf(this.domainEvents);
    }

    public void issue() {
        if (!(java.util.Objects.equals(this.status, InvoiceStatus.Draft))) {
            throw new koine.runtime.DomainException("only a draft invoice can be issued");
        }
        this.status = InvoiceStatus.Issued;
        this.domainEvents.add(new InvoiceIssued(this.id, this.total));
    }

    @Override
    public boolean equals(Object o) {
        if (this == o) {
            return true;
        }
        if (!(o instanceof Invoice other)) {
            return false;
        }
        return java.util.Objects.equals(this.id, other.id);
    }

    @Override
    public int hashCode() {
        return java.util.Objects.hashCode(this.id);
    }
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/InvoiceId.java ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing;

/**
 * A strongly-typed identity value for Invoice.
 */
public record InvoiceId(java.util.UUID value) {
    /**
     * Mints a fresh, random identity (a v4 UUID).
     */
    public static InvoiceId generate() {
        return new InvoiceId(java.util.UUID.randomUUID());
    }
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/InvoiceIssued.java ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing;

public record InvoiceIssued(InvoiceId invoiceId, java.math.BigDecimal total) implements DomainEvent {}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/InvoiceRepository.java ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing;

/**
 * Persistence-ignorant repository contract for the Invoice aggregate root.
 */
public interface InvoiceRepository {
    /**
     * Loads the aggregate by its identity, if present.
     */
    java.util.Optional<Invoice> getById(InvoiceId id);

    /**
     * Persists a new aggregate.
     */
    void add(Invoice aggregate);

    /**
     * Persists changes to an existing aggregate.
     */
    void update(Invoice aggregate);

    java.util.List<Invoice> byCustomer(CustomerId customer);
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/InvoiceStatus.java ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing;

public enum InvoiceStatus {
    Draft,
    Issued,
    Paid
}

// ==== koine/runtime/DomainException.java ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.runtime;

/**
 * Thrown when a domain invariant is violated. Unchecked ({@code RuntimeException}) so generated
 * value objects, entities, and aggregates can guard their invariants without checked-exception
 * ceremony — the Java analogue of the C# emitter's DomainInvariantViolationException.
 *
 * <p>Generated by Koine — do not edit by hand.</p>
 */
public class DomainException extends RuntimeException {
    public DomainException(String message) {
        super(message);
    }
}

// ==== koine/runtime/Range.java ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.runtime;

/**
 * A closed interval {@code [start, end]} over a comparable type — the Java analogue of the Rust
 * runtime's {@code Range}. The {@code start()}/{@code end()} accessors are the record's own; the
 * caller is responsible for {@code start <= end} (a domain invariant).
 *
 * <p>Generated by Koine — do not edit by hand.</p>
 */
public record Range<T extends Comparable<? super T>>(T start, T end) {
    /** True when {@code value} lies within the closed interval {@code [start, end]}. */
    public boolean contains(T value) {
        return start.compareTo(value) <= 0 && value.compareTo(end) <= 0;
    }

    /** True when this interval and {@code other} share at least one point. */
    public boolean overlaps(Range<T> other) {
        return start.compareTo(other.end) <= 0 && other.start.compareTo(end) <= 0;
    }
}
